publishedAbstract: - This is baremetal cluster with OCP 4.12.42 and ODF 4.12.11- During mcp update ocs nodes are drained and rebooted one after another, and we may run into this issue: ceph commands fail to report any data 2024-02-27T02:05:29.466+0000 7f3d260f2700-1 monclient: get_monmap_and_config failed to get config- This problem is cannot be reproduced with OCP 4.12.30- On this document, for you reference of logs and test, we had the three nodes ~~~ OCS node OSD MON MON_IP worker-0 osd.2 mon.a 10.x.x.10 worker-1 osd.0 mon.c 10.x.x.11 worker-2 osd.1 mon.d 10.x.x.12 ~~~
publishedTitle: ODF 4.12 Ceph commands fails when OCS node is drained and rebooted due to mcp update : monclient: get_monmap_and_config failed to get config
